query:
SELECT p.name AS project, p.priority, p.sector,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sendReady,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unverified
FROM projects p
JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.id IN (1380015, 1350010, 1380002, 1350030)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.sector
ORDER BY sendReady DESC;

  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sendReady,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unverified
FROM projects p
JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.id IN (1380015, 1350010, 1380002, 1350030)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.sector
ORDER BY sendReady DESC;
